iti16:1.1: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti16:2.1:
“Monks, with regard to internal factors,
I don’t envision any other single factor like appropriate attention as doing so much for a monk in training,
who has not attained the heart’s aspiration but remains intent on the unsurpassed safety from bondage.
iti16:2.2: A monk who attends appropriately abandons what is unskillful and develops what is skillful.
iti16:3.2: as a quality of a monk in training:
